document.docAuthor: Benamar, Loubna, Bennas, Nard, Hassoun, Mustapha & Millán, Andrés
document.masterDocTitle: Checklist of Moroccan aquatic beetles (Coleoptera: Hydraenidae Mulsant, 1844) New records and updates

mods:titleInfo.mods:title: Checklist of Moroccan aquatic beetles (Coleoptera: Hydraenidae Mulsant, 1844) New records and updates

mods:name.mods:affiliation: LESCB URL-CNRST N ° 18, FS, Abdelmalek Essaadi University, Tetouan, Morocco.

Departamento de Ecología e Hidrología, Facultad de Biología, Universidad de Murcia, Murcia, Spain.

subSubSection.paragraph:
Material examined. Rif and Pré-Rif : Chefchaouen. 1 m ,
S61, 12
.VII.2008. 1 m ,
S93, 30
. VI .2003. 1 m ,
S129, 12
.VII.2008. 1 m , 1 f,
S153, 30
.IV.2009. 1 m , S197,
26. V .2009
. 10 m , 10 f, S202,
30. VI .2005
.
Larache
.
1 m , 1 f,
S84, 12
.VII.2007.

( first record ). 6 exs. , S345,
11.IV.1998
.

07.IV.1998
.

.

S89, 04

.

. VI .1991.

:
Berkane
( first record ). 14 exs. , S343,

. 31 exs. , S351, 15.VII.1997 .

.

.III.2008. 1 m ,

Jerada
.

S112, 21
.III.2008. 13 m , 10 f, S213, 18.III.2008 . 27 m , 30 f, S214, 19.III.2008 .

( first record ):
Benslimane.
5 exs. , S383,
01.II.2009
.

. 8 m , 9 f, S221,
04. V .2006

.

.

( first record ). 4 exs. , S328,
20.VII.1997
. 3 exs. , S339, 18.VII.1997 . 2 exs. , S341, 19.VII.1997 . 3 exs. , S356, 19.IV.2001 .
Anti Atlas
:
Agadir Ida-Outanane.
2 exs. , S342,
21.VII.1997
. 111 exs. , S346, 21.IV.2001 . 2 exs. , S385, 23.VII.1997 .
Guelmim
( first record ). 10 exs. , S353,
17.IV.2001
. 5 exs. , S372, 18.IV.2001 .
Tata
( first record ). 11 exs. , S324,
22.VII.1997
.
Saharan domain
( first record ):
Errfoud
. 12 m , 15 f,
S177, 06
. V .2006.
Distribution in North Africa. Algeria , Morocco and Tunisia ( Jäch & Skale 2015 ).

Moroccan distribution. Rif and Pré-Rif : Chefchaouen, Tétouan, Al Hoceima, Larache, Tanger , Taza, Taounate (
Bennas et al. 2001
) and Nador (
Bennas et al. 2001
;
Chavanon et al. 2004
).
Oriental Plateau
: Figuig (
Chavanon et al. 2004
;
Mabrouki et al. 2018
). Middle
Atlas : Khénifra and Fès
(Orchymont 1942; Jäch 1991 ). High
Atlas : Marrakech
(Orchymont 1942; Jäch 1991 ).
Anti Atlas
: Agadir Ida-Outanane and Taroudant (Orchymont 1942; Jäch 1991 ).
